sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the established template, self-audited before commit. Covers the taste/texture lexicon (sucré/salé/amer/acide/épicé, fondant/croustillant/moelleux, se régaler, exquis), comparaison vs métaphore (with sensory-writing purpose: évoquer, faire appel aux sens), and the article synthesis in food talk (le/du/un + pas de). Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego B2 (Hachette), Dossier 6 'Plaisirs' (Points de vue sur le plaisir des sens — extraits littéraires Proust/Colette/Sagan, p.90; 'Les métaphores', p.93; 'L'article', p.92). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
